_note: 8 hand-verified tickers sized for Alpha Vantage 25-req/day budget (~3 AV calls per ticker = ~24 total, leaving 1 for ad-hoc testing).
_tolerance: expected_ratios compared with 2% relative tolerance; omit fields not verifiable from a primary source.

eval_set._source: Apple 10-K FY2025 (fiscal year ended 27 Sep 2025); revenue $416.2B, gross profit $195.2B, net income $112.0B. gross_margin updated from 0.462 (FY2024) to 0.469; net_margin updated from 0.240 (FY2024) to 0.269. Margin fix now anchors all four concepts to the most recent annual OperatingIncomeLoss end-date (2025-09-27), which returns FY2025 figures via RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax. insider_selling_cluster added: confirmed in live eval run — 3+ distinct insider sellers, 90-day window, zero offsetting purchases (same detector pattern as NVDA).

Microsoft 10-K FY2025 (fiscal year ended 30 Jun 2025); revenue $281.7B, COGS $87.8B, net income $101.8B. gross_margin corrected from 0.698 (stale FY2024 figure) to 0.6882; net_margin corrected from 0.360 to 0.3615 — both confirmed via fresh live XBRL call anchored to end-date 2025-06-30 (RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax). insider_selling_cluster confirmed in live eval run — 3+ distinct insider sellers, 90-day window, zero offsetting purchases (same detector pattern as NVDA and AAPL).

Alphabet 10-K FY2024 (fiscal year ended 31 Dec 2024); revenue $350.0B, gross profit $201.5B, net income $100.1B. Live-verified FY2025 figures now used: gross_margin updated to 0.5965, net_margin updated to 0.3281, replacing the stale FY2024 estimate. debt_spike_recent added: debt_to_equity rose 0.0366 -> 0.1169, a ~220% YoY increase, clearing the debt_spike_recent threshold. insider_selling_cluster confirmed via live eval run, same pattern as NVDA/AAPL/MSFT.

NVIDIA 10-K FY2026 (fiscal year ended 25 Jan 2026). gross_margin corrected from 0.750 (FY2025 figure) to 0.711 — FY2026 10-K reports gross margin declined to 71.1% due to higher Blackwell ramp costs. net_margin 0.558 unchanged. insider_selling_cluster: 3+ distinct insider sellers confirmed in 90-day window, zero offsetting purchases.

Boeing 10-K FY2024. Long-term debt ~$54B (up from ~$10B in 2018), but stockholders equity has been deeply negative since 2020 (~-$23B in FY2024). detect_debt_spike() computes rate-of-change of D/E: with both prev and curr D/E negative, the delta divided by a positive absolute denominator yields a NEGATIVE percentage, so _severity() never triggers (it only fires on pct > 0.25). The detector is blind to worsening leverage once equity flips negative. No flags expected from any of the three detectors; used as an edge-case test for graceful handling of negative-equity D/E data. UPDATE: corrected after the detect_debt_spike sign-crossing fix — BA's D/E history crosses zero between recent periods (-13.72 -> 9.87), which now correctly produces equity_sign_change flags instead of either false debt_spike flags (the original bug) or no flags at all (the pre-fix workaround noted above, which is now outdated).

Intel 10-K FY2024. No revenue/margin detectors exist in the risk agent. debt_spike removed: live get_ratio_history data confirmed the most recent period-over-period D/E change is a ~19% DECREASE (not an increase), so detect_debt_spike() does not fire. The earlier expectation was based on multi-year balance-sheet trend analysis rather than what the detector actually computes from live XBRL data. No other risk_flags detector has been confirmed to fire for INTC; empty pending further evidence.

Rivian 10-K FY2024. IPO Nov 2021; pre-profit EV maker with limited XBRL history. Tests graceful degradation: pe_ratio undefined (net loss), revenue_growth_yoy/qoq may be absent in early filings. No flags expected — pure degradation test. UPDATE: live get_ratio_history data shows a real debt_to_equity jump (0.0892 -> 0.4847, ~443% increase) clearing the debt_spike threshold, and an equity sign-crossing in RIVN's early history (2020 negative -> 2021 positive), both legitimately detected — this is no longer a "zero flags expected" pure degradation case.

Super Micro Computer. EY resigned as auditor Oct 2023; FY2024 10-K (year ended 30 Jun 2024) filed November 2024 after extended delays; that filing explicitly describes restatements of prior-period financials. The restatement detector uses \brestate\b regex, which matches 'restate', 'restated', 'restatement'. 'restatement' is a substring of the real flag name 'restatement'. Tests: XBRL staleness/gaps AND audit-language flag detection via the restatement category.
